sections.heading: New
items: Color grading and visual effects per clip. Curves, color wheels, LUTs, grain, chroma key, and more. Start asking agent to color grade your clips.
Sync audio across multiple tracks. Useful for syncing camera footage and dedicated mic.

sections.heading: Improved
items: Export at 2K or Match Timeline resolution
Import FLAC and AIFF-C audio files
Editor panel sizes are remembered between sessions

sections.heading: Fixed
items: Fixed silent sign-in failures on macOS
Fixed clip rotation being dropped when the agent adjusts transform properties
Fixed position keyframes corrupting clip transform
